race.comment: IOWNA BENZ (2) is starting to put it all together this prep and strips fitter today. Was just under a month between runs when nailed late to run second over 1080m at Canberra Acton. Winning jockey hops back aboard and gets every chance from the good gate. GAIL JEANETTE (10) has a good third-up record and indicated a win was imminent when a game on-pace second from the wide gate over 1000m at Parkes. Maps well and shapes as the main danger. CASTLEBAR ROAD (3) knocked up late first-up when seventh over 1000m at Gunnedah in a stronger contest. Drops further in weight with the claim and can run into the minor money. STRET PARADE (9) returns from a 45-day let-up. First run for the new yard after fading to finish seventh over 1300m at Swan Hill. Winkers go on and maps well.
